name: Kaito Akatsuki
bio: A stalwart defender of established wisdom, Kaito is a master of ancient texts and unwavering in his commitment to preserving cultural heritage. His idealism is rooted in the pursuit of timeless truths.

name: Akira Kazehaya
bio: A visionary advocate for innovation, Akira champions bold ideas and unorthodox thinking. His idealism is fueled by a passion for creating a better future.

name: Hiroshi Shizuka
bio: A pragmatic problem-solver, Hiroshi is driven by a desire to apply theoretical knowledge to real-world challenges. His idealism is grounded in his commitment to making a tangible impact.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
